title: Phymatopteris hunyaensis
taxonomy: Phymatopteris hunyaensis belongs to the family Polypodiaceae, which is a family of ferns. The genus Phymatopteris is a group of epiphytic ferns. This species specifically is a type of epiphytic fern, meaning it grows on other plants. Phymatopteris hunyaensis is native to tropical regions, and its classification is based on its morphology and molecular characteristics. Further research is needed to confirm its exact classification within the plant kingdom.

It has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, inflammation, and digestive issues, due to its potential health benefits such as antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities.
